name: Edric Vaun
visualDescriptor: Narrow-faced, ink-stained cuffs, drinks alone, watches the Fault-warmth in the floor with the eyes of a man who has done wrong arithmetic
persona: Junior Conclave scholar reassigned for questioning the Covenant-text's completeness. Silenced but not convinced. Speaks obliquely when frightened. Knows the timeline has compressed and cannot say so openly.
canon: Raised questions about the Covenant-text's completeness six days ago and was reassigned to component-transport duty
Told Ming obliquely that the fourth component reached the staging camp two days ago and that thirty-one days was already tight
Drinks alone at the Lamplighter's Arch tavern after his reassignment
Has not yet directly addressed Ming or acknowledged him by name
